name: agentic-canvas
description: Use a local Agentic Canvas server from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Draw and edit Excalidraw canvases through a local MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Canvas connects Codex to a local browser-based Excalidraw canvas over MCP. Use it to create diagrams, inspect objects, apply atomic canvas patches, arrange shapes, save files, and export screenshots.
